name: agriculture-robotics
description: MEOK AI Labs — Agricultural Robotics Governance. ISO 18497 robot safety, EPA pesticide drift, FAA farm drone compliance.

tools.name: robot_safety_check
tools.description: Run safety diagnostics on agricultural robot systems per ISO 18497 (Collaborative robots).

tools.name: spray_plan_calculator
tools.description: Calculate spray coverage with EPA drift mitigation and buffer zone compliance.

tools.name: harvest_optimization
tools.description: Optimize harvest schedule with moisture, weather, and equipment readiness.

tools.name: drone_flight_plan
tools.description: Generate agricultural drone flight plan with CAA compliance for Part 107/Part 107+.

tools.name: soil_analysis
tools.description: Analyze soil nutrients and generate fertilizer recommendations.

tools.name: irrigation_schedule
tools.description: Calculate irrigation schedule using FAO-56 evapotranspiration.
